critical_flaws: KD ~10^-17 attributed to Tsvetkov 2022 not verified - actual log K may be 14-16
Molecular fossil claim: convergent sulfur chemistry is the null hypothesis
critic_questions: If log K is 14-16, does hypothesis survive?
What distinguishes inheritance from convergent chemistry?

critical_flaws: Cu+ disproportionates at pH 7; no stability field in standard Pourbaix at pH 7
430 mV driving force uses free Cu2+, not elesclomol-Cu2+
Rotenone test has fatal confound: blocks respiration, which independently abolishes cuproptosis
critic_questions: How to separate Eh from respiration cessation?

critical_flaws: 3x10^4 Cu atoms per mitochondrion insufficient for 10nm CuS nanoparticle
Biological H2S 10-100 nM vs mM-M in vents
EDX cannot distinguish CuS nanoparticles from Cu-DLAT aggregates
critic_questions: How to distinguish CuS from Cu-DLAT?

critical_flaws: Geological pyrite->chalcopyrite dissolution-precipitation at >150C, not direct exchange
EXAFS Cu-S 0.1A difference at resolution limits
strengths_retained: Cu+ displacement from Fe-S clusters established (Macomber & Imlay 2009)
29 orders of magnitude Ksp driving force real
CIA vs LIAS differential rescue prediction is clean
critic_questions: Which cluster type kinetically accessible first?

critical_flaws: NMR data (Cobine 2006) shows CuL is aromatic/fluorescent - contradicts dithiolane prediction
Generator admits vent chemistry is decorative
critiques.kill_reason: Published NMR counter-evidence directly contradicts core chemical identity prediction

critical_flaws: CuS + H2O2 Fenton chemistry not novel (environmental remediation 2014-2025)
ETC disruption during cuproptosis REDUCES H2O2 - loop self-terminates
critic_questions: Min CuS for radical generation at nM H2O2?
How differs from standard Cu Fenton?

critical_flaws: FDX1 primary function is steroidogenesis/Fe-S biogenesis; Cu interaction may be incidental
Protocell experiment requires ~6 simultaneous parameters - practically infeasible
FDX1/LIAS divergence >2.4 Ga is near-trivially true
critic_questions: Do high-Cu organisms have FDX1 variants?

kill_reasons: H1.5: Published NMR counter-evidence from definitive group contradicts dithiolane prediction
